title: cassine lyciodes
intro: Cassine lyciodes, also known as African star anise, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its star-shaped fruit and aromatic leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Cassine lyciodes has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and aiding digestion. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
